purpose: Preserve user feedback, useful LLM outputs, and the corrected MMM source-field context so future Codex work does not lose the larger plan.

runtime_separation.codex: Owns this wiki/codex-memory packet. Do not store Codex memory under A2 state.
runtime_separation.claude: Independent runtime with its own context surfaces; do not mix files.
runtime_separation.hermes: Independent runtime with its own context surfaces; do not mix files.
runtime_separation.wiki_harness: Shared language reservoir and upstream context source, not a place to overwrite runtime-specific control law without an explicit admission step.

core_corrections_to_preserve.correction: Council does not need perfect tuning now. It should run as a lightweight voice/check and improve opportunistically while other work proceeds.
core_corrections_to_preserve.operating_rule: Council may push back, preserve divergence, or audit a packet, but it must not become the controller, worker pool, tool runner, or main project.

core_corrections_to_preserve.correction: User feedback is tuning input for the larger project, not the whole prompt object. Use feedback to improve the next concrete work packet.
Do not fixate on the concurrent cap. Run rolling waves, close workers, and launch the next wave. Track spawned/blocked/deferred truth without making the number the objective.
MMMs are not the research target. They stabilize high-entropy worker reasoning so A1/A2/B/SIM work produces better admissibility judgments, blocker clarity, and sim questions.
Once MMMs are stable enough to protect sim work from collapse, return directly to sims. MMM work must not become a permanent side project.
The 55-item list is the MMM source field. Mach, Faraday, and later Wittgenstein are examples inside the larger field, not the center.
MMM dictionaries are aligned language reservoirs, not rule lists and not banned-word lists.

Kant is a major constrained or contrast source. The user sees Kant as co-opting empiricist language while preserving rationalist commitments and suppressing Hume's deeper critique. Do not let Kant become a hidden organizing center.
Do not use system_v4/a2_state or A2 state as Codex general memory. A2 state is project/runtime state, not Codex private external memory.
core_corrections_to_preserve.operating_rule: Codex memory belongs in /Users/joshuaeisenhart/wiki/codex-memory unless a later explicit admission step routes a specific fact into project state.

core_corrections_to_preserve.correction: The 55-item source list is not canon. It was made by Codex and can be improved. Treat it as a provisional source-field scaffold.
core_corrections_to_preserve.operating_rule: Preserve the list and provenance, but do not freeze it. New aligned people/schools can be added; weak or misleading items can be constrained or demoted.

mmm_why.short_version: MMMs are mini mimetic-meme-manifold language bodies that shape worker salience before task cards so lanes do not collapse into the controller's default story.
project_function: Improve upstream proposal language before A1/A2/B/SIM work.
Make evidence, admissibility, witness, passenger, residue, blocker, survived, killed, and open distinctions easier to produce correctly.
Reduce fake promotion, role collapse, and vague narrative closure.
Produce better bounded sim questions: what survives, what fails, what evidence is missing, and what promotion is blocked.
stop_gate: Core lane bodies produce non-duplicated packets.
Each packet ends in a concrete sim or queue action, or an explicit park reason.
Audit catches status inflation in at least one test case.
The next three real tasks are sim-side tasks.

If two consecutive MMM waves produce mainly formatting, voice polish, or prompt-law edits without better A1 admissibility, sim question selection, or blocker clarity, pause MMM expansion and return to sims.

philosophy_and_method: 30. Scientific realism only when earned by tests
eastern_posture_light_touch: 34. Mencian cultivation / conditions for good action
engineering_and_craft: 44. Lean manufacturing, only the practical parts
anti_aligned_or_constrained_sources: 48. Rationalism - constrained; useful only with evidence gates
50. Mystical totalization - excluded unless translated into operational language

dictionary_build_sequence.output: Assign every item a primary role: core, technical, method, posture, craft, constrained.
dictionary_build_sequence.closure: All 55 items are preserved in order and assigned without over-centering one author.

dictionary_build_sequence.output: For each block, build aligned terms, high-correlation terms, example sentence patterns, collapse signatures, and sim-routing effect.
dictionary_build_sequence.closure: Every entry describes worker behavior, not merely intellectual vibe.

dictionary_build_sequence.output: Create mini-MMM slices for Direct, Popper/Feynman, Systems/Strategy/Factory, Audit, Alternative/Reframe/Wildcard, and Hume.
dictionary_build_sequence.closure: Each lane slice changes at least one sim-planning decision or blocker statement in a test prompt.

dictionary_build_sequence.output: Resume tool sims, tool-integration sims, lego rows, then couplings only when gates are earned.
dictionary_build_sequence.closure: MMM work stops being the main queue and becomes a support lane only.

candidate_next_packets: Classify all 55 items into primary role plus operational job.
Build the dictionary kernel with aligned terms and high-correlation terms for each block.
Build lane slices for Direct, Popper/Feynman, Systems/Strategy/Factory, Audit, Hume, and Alternative/Reframe/Wildcard.
Run Tier D Readiness Wave 0 when returning to sim-side work.

format_and_runtime_notes.preferred_output_style: Use the full readable format with emojis, Results, Follow-up, and Hygiene when relevant.
format_and_runtime_notes.subagent_policy: Use rolling waves of subagents for substantive tuning/planning; close workers before launching new waves; do not present fake plurality.
format_and_runtime_notes.council_policy: Run council as a lightweight voice/check by default; escalate only when plurality/collapse itself is the work.
format_and_runtime_notes.markdown_policy: Do not save markdown unless explicitly asked. This packet is JSON for that reason.

open_items: Decide whether to mirror this JSON into the wiki harness as a shared reservoir entry.
Decide whether Claude and Hermes should read this packet or receive separate runtime-native copies.
Run a later admission step if this packet should become canonical rather than context memory.
Build the actual dictionary entries and lane slices.

source_field_status.list_origin: Codex-made scaffold refined by user feedback
source_field_status.change_policy: Can be improved, expanded, reweighted, split, or demoted as better source fields are found.
source_field_status.added_people_policy: Additional people, schools, and technical traditions may be included when they improve MMM behavior or sim-routing clarity.
source_field_status.admission_gate: A source earns weight only if it changes worker behavior, improves admissibility judgment, clarifies blockers, improves sim question selection, or catches collapse.
